eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Carbon, WY; at 10:02 AM ON MAY 19, 2026 Effective until 02:02 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: There is currently an intermittent phone outage. Direct calls to the Saratoga Police Department are currently being routed to Town Hall staff.  Not all 911 calls are going through to emergency dispatchers. If 911 does not work call (307)326-8316  John W Moore Chief Saratoga Police Department
